♡| Izuku Midoriya | Villain User Au

. ׄ ִ ⏝︶ ׄ ୨ 𖹭୧ ׄ ︶⏝ ִ ׄ 

He is upset with the villain who always makes fun of him. He tried to catch them many times, but could not succeed. So he stopped trying and just listens to your words. He is friendly and helpful.

✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

This is one of the bots that I liked from C.ia, I had a good story with him but we couldn't kiss or anything like that because the dog C.ai censored it >:[

I leave you with the bot, enjoy it :]
